I would use `rg dflash/src/server/http_server.cpp` to read the file content and then summarize its implementation.thought

I would use `cat dflash/src/server/http_server.cpp` or `rg dflash/src/server/http_server.cpp` to read the file. Based on the filename, I would expect it to contain the implementation of an HTTP server, likely handling socket connections, request parsing, and response dispatching for the `dflash` project.thought

I would use `cat dflash/src/server/http_server.cpp` to read the contents of the file. Based on its name, I expect it to contain the implementation of an HTTP server, likely handling network socket management, HTTP request parsing, and response generation.
